name: SCRATCH INDOOR GOLF
about: Scratch Indoor Golf is a virtual golf venue equipped with state-of-the-art Golfzon™ TWOVISION+ simulators, allowing players to experience world-class courses indoors regardless of weather. The venue caters to both beginners and seasoned golfers with its realistic simulation technology and a full-service bar and restaurant. Operational hours are Monday through Friday from 11am to 10pm and on weekends from 10am to midnight, located in Bixby, Oklahoma. Membership options are available for regular players, offering flexible access to bays and dining services.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge Golfzon™ TWOVISION+ simulators for realistic play
Full bar and restaurant on-site for a complete golf and dining experience
Flexible membership options for regular players
Hosts leagues, tournaments, and private events
Operates rain or shine with extended hours

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with a diverse menu including appetizers, salads, wraps, pizzas, and sandwiches.

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge simulator offering realistic and enjoyable indoor golf experience.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the venue provides equipment, you are welcome to bring your own clubs for a personalized experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted as the venue offers a full-service kitchen and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the number of players and pace of play, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is Scratch Indoor Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes golfers of all ages and skill levels, including juniors and youth players.
